interface.name: LM_CreateOrUpdateLeaveRequest
interface.description: Form interface for creating or updating LM Leave Requests as an action
interface.definition: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_formLayout_v2"( titleBar: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerTemplateFull"( title: if( ri!isUpdate, "Submit Leave Request", "Submit Leave Request" ), secondaryText: if( ri!isUpdate, "Form for employees to submit new leave requests", "Form for employees to submit new leave requests" ) ), isTitleBarFixed: true, contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_fileUploadField_v1"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/c1fdec5b-a0c8-4b7b-9ac6-1ef130109dc9/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", target: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5", maxSelections: 1, required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/c1fdec5b-a0c8-4b7b-9ac6-1ef130109dc9"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/c1fdec5b-a0c8-4b7b-9ac6-1ef130109dc9"], documentActions: {"DOWNLOAD", "PREVIEW", "EDIT_NAME", "EDIT_DESCRIPTION"} ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dateField"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/1f362853-ed06-493a-b145-51c00c77ef0f/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/1f362853-ed06-493a-b145-51c00c77ef0f"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/1f362853-ed06-493a-b145-51c00c77ef0f"], marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_pickerFieldUsers"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/c545c8a1-f709-4d28-80eb-514e265c638c/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", placeholder: "Start typing to select a reviewed by", maxSelections: 1, required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/c545c8a1-f709-4d28-80eb-514e265c638c"], saveInto: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/fedea652-6a34-4ad7-83f2-df92cde2dfc8/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", placeholder: "Select a leave type", maxSelections: 1, recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:3ab4bda6-482c-435c-a163-224ea581a6b4", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/fedea652-6a34-4ad7-83f2-df92cde2dfc8"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/fedea652-6a34-4ad7-83f2-df92cde2dfc8"], marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_paragraphField"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/e265b7c4-8868-4dbf-b6f4-c1907f58ab97/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/e265b7c4-8868-4dbf-b6f4-c1907f58ab97"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/e265b7c4-8868-4dbf-b6f4-c1907f58ab97"], characterLimit: 4000, height: "TALL", marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dateTimeField"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/fdf2664b-21c8-4e1e-8577-b56fb93311a4/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", maxSelections: 1, recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:ce884c49-2bb2-493b-8e5a-db151e249aa7", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/23ece036-d812-49aa-b16c-8d7dcf6f3dc9"], saveInto: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/e577ffa1-6e4e-4d11-8911-031061061ee9/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/e577ffa1-6e4e-4d11-8911-031061061ee9"], saveInto: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/0c33da42-a2a5-4946-a4e4-65b6291b4e20/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/6f082b3f-0ca8-4da5-b436-5e8d333e375c/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/6f082b3f-0ca8-4da5-b436-5e8d333e375c"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/6f082b3f-0ca8-4da5-b436-5e8d333e375c"], characterLimit: 4000, height: "TALL", marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dateField"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/97bccf76-afed-44fc-bba2-bce458296ab8/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/97bccf76-afed-44fc-bba2-bce458296ab8"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/97bccf76-afed-44fc-bba2-bce458296ab8"], marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_pickerFieldRecords_v2"( label: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/0aac0120-dc90-41da-8426-3d7bf8d7ba89/displayName", labelPosition: "ABOVE", placeholder: "Select a employee", maxSelections: 1, recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:4ec99318-6b6d-4819-9391-9c6a588598ee", required: true, value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/0aac0120-dc90-41da-8426-3d7bf8d7ba89"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/0aac0120-dc90-41da-8426-3d7bf8d7ba89"], marginAbove: "LESS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_booleanCheckboxField"( choiceLabel: #"urn:appian:record-field-properties:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/4d9cfcb7-87c6-4fd7-835e-ea798b4e8f66/displayName", value: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/4d9cfcb7-87c6-4fd7-835e-ea798b4e8f66"], saveInto: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/4d9cfcb7-87c6-4fd7-835e-ea798b4e8f66"], marginAbove: "STANDARD" ) }, shape: "SEMI_ROUNDED", padding: "MORE", style: "NONE" ) }, buttons: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_ButtonLayout"( primaryButtons: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: if( ri!isUpdate, "Save", "Create" ), submit: true, validate: true, saveInto: { if( ri!isUpdate, { a!save( target: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/2e9ed1da-2b13-4beb-a780-aa9c6b9f1e0e"], value: loggedInUser() ), a!save( target: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/16e2781a-0be6-4ce2-aa99-711c604f7ea0"], value: now() ) }, { a!save( target: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/d406c9cb-0e34-4082-b652-df4fd1ecf77b"], value: loggedInUser() ), a!save( target: ri!leaveRequest[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:395f8953-4168-4469-bc98-076fc835d6b5/76516383-77a3-477b-a547-dbcc66df3409"], value: now() ) } ) }, style: "SOLID" ) }, secondaryButtons: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"( label: "Cancel", submit: true, validate: false, saveInto: ri!cancel, style: "OUTLINE", value: true ) } ), backgroundColor: "#F6F7F9", showTitleBarDivider: false, contentsWidth: "FULL" )

namedTypedValue.name: isUpdate
namedTypedValue.description: Tracks whether this form is being used to create a new record or update an existing one
